title: Ecto: query
description: A database query executed via an Ecto repository. The actual event_type is dynamic: it is derived from the repository's telemetry_prefix config plus [:query], e.g. [:my_app, :repo, :query] becomes "my_app.repo.query". Transaction bookkeeping, schema migrations, and Oban job table queries are excluded by default.

event_type.description: Dynamic event type derived from repo telemetry_prefix, e.g. "my_app.repo.query".

query.description: Obfuscated SQL with bind parameters replaced by ?.

query_time.description: Time spent executing the query in microseconds.

decode_time.description: Time spent decoding the result in microseconds.

queue_time.description: Time spent waiting for a database connection in microseconds.

total_time.description: Total time including queue, query, and decode in microseconds.

stacktrace.description: Formatted call stack at query time. Only present when include_stacktrace: true is configured and the repo has stacktrace: true enabled.

params.description: Query parameters. Only present when include_params: true is configured.

request_id.description: Request ID from the current EventContext.

idle_time.description: Time the connection spent idle before the query in microseconds.
